Choose Your Plan

PathBinder Subscription

All plans include the PathBinder mobile app.

Paid plans are monthly subscriptions that renew automatically at the full plan price until cancelled. Cancel anytime from your account settings — no cancellation fees. Annual billing locks in a discounted rate for 12 months.

Free plan is limited to 4 binders. Upgrade to Collector for unlimited binders — 25% off your first month as a welcome offer.

Add to Wishlist

Ghost cards appear semi-transparent in your binder. Track your savings progress toward buying it.

New Binder

Organise your collection into separate binders by set, type, or anything you like.

Sold Offline

Log a sale that happened outside PathBinder. The card will be removed from your active binder and recorded in your sales history.

Bulk Import

Upload your inventory spreadsheet — cards are added to your binder. From there you can list any card for sale (with photos), or mark it as sold offline.
